what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a board-item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It records an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
standouts: The entire content is metadata: a typed pointer to an external board item.
The target uses a 'board://' URI scheme.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Uses a board:// URI to reference a board item.
Attachment identifier follows the 'att-' prefix pattern.
concerns: No body or explanatory context is present.
Meaning depends entirely on the external board item not shown here.
No author or rationale field is recorded.
notes: A metadata-only attachment that points to board item item-33c1a554 in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or state does board://item-33c1a554 represent?
Why was this attachment created at this timestamp?
Who created this attachment and what action triggered it?
purpose_vs_actual: The declared attachment_type 'board_items' and target URI match the actual content: it is a metadata-only pointer to a board item.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, timestamped ledger entry that links a channel-memory attachment to a specific board item for later retrieval or audit.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped attachment identifier and a typed link between a channel memory record and a board item, supporting lookup and traceability without embedding the item's content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file of type board_items that points to board item item-33c1a554 in the dragnet-development channel and records its creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a typed reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item for traceability.
